title: GRIN: The #1 Influencer Marketing Software

headers.text: GRIN is the #1 Creator Marketing Platform
Choose your path — Gia’s AI-powered automation or GRIN Platform’s hands-on control.

Turn creators into your most⚡️
powerfulgrowth channel.

You’re the strategist, relationship-builder and creative force behind your brand. GRIN automates manual tasks and simplifies your workflow, so you have time to take your creator program to the next level.

paragraphs: Your AI creator marketing agent. Gia finds the right creators, writes the outreach, handles the gifting, and tracks performance — so your team can focus on strategy.
Yesterday, I matched you with10 new creators, reactivated3 inactive partners, and followed up with8 creatorsto keep campaigns on track.
The industry-standard creator management platform. A decade of trust, built for teams who want hands-on control of every creator relationship.
